document_summary: Letter of Appointment from Journal of Advertising Study appointing Dehuan Liu as an editor for the editorial board, with a three-year term starting from October 10, 2010.

snippets.text: Hereby, we appoint Mr. Dehuan Liu as an editor for the editorial board of Journal of Advertising Study magazine, with the term of appointment starting from October 10, 2010, for a period of three years.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Official appointment of Liu to the editorial board of Journal of Advertising Study, demonstrating his role as a judge/reviewer of others' work in the field.

snippets.text: Journal of Advertising Study (Advertising Panorama) Editorial Department October 10, 2010 (Seal)
snippets.subject: Journal of Advertising Study
snippets.reasoning: Issuing authority and date of the editorial board appointment letter, with official seal.

entities.name: Journal of Advertising Study
entities.identity: First advertising academic journal in China, founded 2005

relations.context: Appointed as editor for the editorial board starting October 10, 2010
